forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then turning east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then turning easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 35 to 45 km/h turning southerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late afternoon then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely later this evening. Possible small hail in the south. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
High
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 30 to 40 km/h turning southerly 20 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Becoming cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 30 to 40 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h.
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:30am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]
Cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 32.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 34.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges early this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek early this evening. Winds southerly 30 to 45 km/h.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
